name: testToggleStatusRadioButtonsCorrectly
description: Verifies that the status radio buttons ('Active' and 'Inactive') toggle correctly.
descriptionHtml: Verifies that the status radio buttons ('Active' and 'Inactive') toggle correctly.

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verifies that the status radio buttons ('Active' and 'Inactive') toggle correctly.

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
